Name: iMultiplayerKills
Description: 0 - none, 1 - own, 2 - all, 3 - player deaths, 4 - own kills and player deaths

Name: iMaxNumNotificationMessages
Description: Number of messages in battle. Value 4 - about 10 messages. It may be confusing, but the formula is linear, so it's not hard to figure out the number of rows you need.

Name: bFixNotificationMessages
Description: Fix Warband bug where the combat log disappears from the screen if too much information is being written out too quickly.
